programs.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programs.desc: Aardvarks Willie and Peanut go on a blind date that could ultimately produce the park's first-ever aardvark babies; a black rhino undergoes a blood draw; a massive Nile crocodile gets a checkup for his injured tail.

programs.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programs.desc: Peri the porcupine is about to give birth to a fuzzy new baby; Anala, a Sumatran tiger, faces a series of challenging tests to keep her mentally and physically stimulated; Dugan, a southern white rhino, enjoys a birthday party.

programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programs.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programs.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programs.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programs.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programs.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!
